sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57775" key="klei=sis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλεῖσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (κλείω</foreign> A) <sense id="n57775.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλῇσις</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
